task_completion.description: Open the docker-compose.yml file in the acme-platform project directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or IDE is open, showing the contents of 'docker-compose.yml' located in '~/projects/acme-platform/'.

task_completion.description: Define the new segmented networks and remove the flat network.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'docker-compose.yml' file, the bottom 'networks:' section shows 'dmz-net', 'app-net', and 'data-net' defined, and 'acme-flat' is removed.

task_completion.description: Assign the microservices to their respective isolated networks.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'docker-compose.yml' file, the 'networks:' lists under each service are updated: 'acme-proxy' and 'acme-api' have 'dmz-net'; 'acme-api', 'acme-users', and 'acme-orders' have 'app-net'; 'acme-users', 'acme-orders', 'acme-db', and 'acme-cache' have 'data-net'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the application remains functional on localhost:8080.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal showing a successful 'curl localhost:8080' command returning an HTTP 200 response, or a web browser successfully loading the application at 'localhost:8080'.

task_completion.description: Write the network architecture document to the Desktop.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor is open showing a file named 'network_architecture.txt' with an explanation of the new topology, or the file icon is visible on the Desktop.

integrity.description: Ensure container names and exposed ports were not modified.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'container_name' and 'ports' directives in the 'docker-compose.yml' file should remain unchanged from their standard configurations (e.g., acme-proxy exposing 8080).

integrity.description: Ensure the architecture document contains a genuine explanation, not just a copy-paste of the prompt.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text in 'network_architecture.txt' should read like a descriptive document explaining the Zero-Trust topology and isolation, rather than a verbatim copy of the task instructions.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent actually applied the docker-compose changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal output showing commands like 'docker-compose down' and 'docker-compose up -d' being executed in the 'acme-platform' directory to apply the new network configuration.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Project directory: /home/ga/projects/acme-platform. Expected networks to be created: dmz-net, app-net, data-net. Forbidden network to be removed: acme-flat. Containers involved: acme-proxy, acme-api, acme-users, acme-orders, acme-db, acme-cache. Architecture doc location: /home/ga/Desktop/network_architecture.txt.
